GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  Z:(0,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)
GM1  GM3  GM2  GM4  GM5  R1  R3  R2  R4  R5  (S)U1  (S)U3  (S)U2  (S)U4  (S)U5  (T)S1  (T)S3  (T)S2  (T)S4  (T)S5  (U)T1  (U)T3  (U)T2  (U)T4  (U)T5  (X)Z1  (X)Z3  (X)Z2  (X)Z4  (X)Z5  (Y)X1  (Y)X3  (Y)X2  (Y)X4  (Y)X5  (Z)Y1  (Z)Y3  (Z)Y2  (Z)Y4  (Z)Y5
1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2
